---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

SUMMARY

A clear description of what you want added or changed.

USE CASE

Explain why this feature would be useful. Describe the problem it solves or the workflow it improves.

PROPOSED SOLUTION

If you have an idea for how this should work, describe it here. Code examples are welcome.

ALTERNATIVES CONSIDERED

Any other approaches you have thought about.
